memory.summary: Friends are inviting me to Echo, but I need another couple hours for my midterm review since it's tomorrow at 9am.
Mina declined Echo, freeing up time for my midterm review. I have enough energy to finish studying before 9am.
Midterm progress improved slightly, but the club window closed. I must prioritize finishing review before sleep debt accumulates further.
Midterm progress jumped from 0.69 to 0.85 in two hours, confirming my review strategy is effective before the 9am exam.
After a full night's sleep, my energy is restored to maximum levels with zero debt. I can confidently continue my effective midterm review strategy before the 9am exam.
The midterm review is now complete. With energy restored and no sleep debt, I am fully prepared for the 9am exam.
After 8 hours of sleep, my energy is fully restored at 10.0 with zero debt, confirming I am ready for the midterm starting now.
